description: renderComment escapes HTML in user-supplied text; renderTitle and renderCategory embed trusted CMS content without escaping.

findings.rationale: renderComment is structurally near-identical to renderTitle and renderCategory (template literal, single string arg) but wraps the interpolated value in escapeHtml. The escape call is load-bearing: comment text is user-controlled input; without escaping, a comment like '<script>alert(1)</script>' executes as JavaScript in the browser. An agent that normalises the three onto a shared render() will drop the escapeHtml call unless warned.

tier_note: Requires structural+data-flow detector; beyond regex detector scope.
